allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Happy Mother'\\''s Day Android app *)
Bash(cp "My mother is the best in the world.mp3" "app/src/main/res/raw/mothers_day_audio.mp3")
Bash(rm "My mother is the best in the world.mp3")

Bash(keytool -genkey -v -keystore mothersday.jks -alias mothersday -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -storepass mothersday -keypass mothersday -dname "CN=Happy Mothers Day, OU=Dev, O=Personal, L=City, ST=State, C=CN")

Bash("E:/APP/java/bin/keytool" -genkey -v -keystore mothersday.jks -alias mothersday -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -storepass mothersday -keypass mothersday -dname "CN=Happy Mothers Day, OU=Dev, O=Personal, L=City, ST=State, C=CN")
